title: 0/1 Knapsack
description: Given n items each with a weight and a value, and a knapsack of capacity W, find the maximum total value you can carry without exceeding the weight limit. Each item can be taken at most once.
inputSpec: First line: n and W. Next n lines: weight_i value_i.

botCodes.code:
n,W=map(int,input().split())
items=[tuple(map(int,input().split())) for _ in range(n)]
dp=[0]*(W+1)
for w,v in items:
    for j in range(W,w-1,-1):
        dp[j]=max(dp[j],dp[j-w]+v)
print(dp[W])

let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id and cap=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let items=Array.init n(fun _->(Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id,Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id)) in let dp=Array.make(cap+1)0 in Array.iter(fun(w,v)->for j=cap downto w do if dp.(j-w)+v>dp.(j)then dp.(j)<-dp.(j-w)+v done)items;Printf.printf"%d\n" dp.(cap)
